---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplotify)
library(reshape2)
library(GGally)

# ==================== 1. 全局主题骨架 ====================
my_theme <- theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12,family="serif"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold",family="serif"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold.italic",family="serif"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right"
  )
theme_set(my_theme)

# ==================== 2. 全局离散调色板 (Nature 风格) ====================
# 适用于：分组箱线图、柱状图、分类散点图
# options(ggplot2.discrete.colour = ggsci::scale_color_npg)
# options(ggplot2.discrete.fill   = ggsci::scale_fill_npg)

# 自定义配色
options(ggplot2.discrete.colour = c('#F7A8B8', '#9BC2E6', '#FDD87D', '#A9D18E', '#C39BD3'))
options(ggplot2.discrete.fill   = c('#F7A8B8', '#9BC2E6', '#FDD87D', '#A9D18E', '#C39BD3'))

# ==================== 3. 全局连续调色板 (高质感 SCI 风格) ====================
# 适用于：相关性热图、密度图、连续数值的散点映射

# 方案A：使用顶刊极度推崇的 viridis 渐变色（直接用内置的快捷方式）
# options(ggplot2.continuous.colour = "viridis")
# options(ggplot2.continuous.fill   = "viridis")

# # 方案B：如果你更偏爱热图中经典的“蓝-白-红”发散型渐变，可以自定义一个函数：
my_gradient_fill <- function(...) scale_fill_gradient(low = "#7B7BBD",  high = "#D7B6B6")
my_gradient_col <- function(...) scale_color_gradient(llow = "#7B7BBD",  high = "#D7B6B6")
# 好像会出些问题
options(ggplot2.continuous.fill = my_gradient_fill)
options(ggplot2.continuous.colour = my_gradient_col)
# ========================================
p_scatter <- ggplot(iris, aes(Sepal.Length, Petal.Length, color = Species)) + geom_point()
p_box     <- ggplot(iris, aes(Species, Sepal.Width, fill = Species)) + geom_boxplot()
p_violin  <- ggplot(iris, aes(Species, Petal.Width, fill = Species)) + geom_violin()
p_density <- ggplot(iris, aes(Sepal.Length, fill = Species)) + geom_density(alpha = 0.4)
p_hist    <- ggplot(iris, aes(Petal.Length)) + geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue") 
p_bar     <- ggplot(iris, aes(Species, fill = Species) )+ geom_bar()
p_col1 <- ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = cut, fill = color)) +  geom_bar(position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),width = 0.9)
p_col2 <- ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = cut, fill = color)) +  geom_bar(position = "fill") + scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)
p_col3 <- ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = cut, fill = color)) +  geom_bar(position = "dodge") + facet_grid(. ~ color) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,hjust = 1)) 

df_cor    <- melt(cor(iris[,1:4]))
p_heat    <- ggplot(df_cor, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = value)) + geom_tile()
p_parallel<- ggparcoord(iris, columns = 1:4, groupColumn = 'Species')
#' 高级 SCI 组图模板
#' 
#' @param plot_list 包含 ggplot 对象、Base R 绘图函数、或 grob 的列表
#' @param nrow 行数
#' @param ncol 列数
#' @param labels 标签类型，默认为 "AUTO" (A, B, C...)
#' @param title 主标题
auto_cowplot <- function(plot_list, nrow = 2, ncol = 2, 
                          labels = "AUTO", label_size = 14, 
                          title = NULL) {
  
  # 内部处理函数：将任何类型的输入转化为统一的 ggplot 对象
  clean_plots <- lapply(plot_list, function(p) {
    if (inherits(p, "ggplot")) {
      return(p)
    } else if (inherits(p, "function") || inherits(p, "call") || inherits(p, "expression")) {
      # 使用 ggplotify 捕获 Base R 函数
      return(as.ggplot(p))
    } else {
      # 处理 Grob 或其他网格对象
      return(as.ggplot(p))
    }
  })
  
  # 使用 cowplot 排版并添加标签
  combine_plot <- plot_grid(
    plotlist = clean_plots,
    nrow = nrow,
    ncol = ncol,
    labels = labels,
    label_size = label_size,
    label_fontface = "bold",
    align = "hv",        # 自动对齐坐标轴
    axis = "tblr"
  )
  
  # 如果有标题，添加标题
  if (!is.null(title)) {
    title_grob <- ggdraw() + 
      draw_label(title, fontface = 'bold', x = 0, hjust = 0, size = 18) +
      theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 7))
    
    combine_plot <- plot_grid(
      title_grob, combine_plot,
      ncol = 1,
      rel_heights = c(0.1, 1) # 标题占 10% 高度
    )
  }
  
  return(combine_plot)
}


# 将混合对象放入列表
group_list <- list(
  p_scatter, p_box, p_violin, 
  p_density, p_hist, p_bar,
  p_heat 
)

# 一键出图
final_plot <- auto_cowplot(
  plot_list = group_list,
  nrow = 3, ncol = 3,
  title = ""
)

print(final_plot)
# ggsave(filename = "1.pdf",height = 12,width = 16,family = "serif")
# ggsave(filename = "1.png",height = 6,width = 12,bg = "white")
# ===============
library(ggalign)
align_plots(!!!group_list,ncol = 3) # 可以探索这个包的函数组合图

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
